nasb.text: For as the rain and the snow come down from heaven, And do not return there without watering the earth And making it bear and sprout, And furnishing seed to the sower and bread to the eater;

esv.text: “For as the rain and the snow come down from heaven and do not return there but water the earth, making it bring forth and sprout, giving seed to the sower and bread to the eater,

cnv.text: 雨雪怎樣從天上降下來， 不再返回天上，卻灌溉大地， 使地上的植物發芽結實， 使撒種的有種子，吃的人有糧食；

ccb.text: 雨雪从天降下，并不返回， 而是要滋润大地， 使地上的植物发芽生长， 叫播种的有种子， 吃饭的有食粮。

csbs.text: 雨雪怎样从天而降， 不徒然返回原处，却滋润大地， 使地上发芽结实，让播种的有种子，吃食的有粮食；
